channel.title: Financial Security Institute (FSI) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Financial Security Institute (FSI) (fsi).

item.title: CVE-2026-9157 · 8.6 HIGH — Remote Code Execution in Gmission Web FAX
item.description: Improper input validation, Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in Gmission Web Fax allows Remote Code Inclusion. This issue affects Web Fax: from 3.0 before 3.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-15070 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Data Exposure in Gmission Web FAX
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor, Missing Authorization vulnerability in Gmission Web Fax allows Authentication Abuse. This issue affects Web Fax: from 3.0 before 3.0.1

item.title: CVE-2025-15069 · 8.4 HIGH — Privilege Escalation in Gmission Web FAX
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in Gmission Web Fax allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects Web Fax: from 3.0 before 3.0.1

item.title: CVE-2025-15068 · 8.5 HIGH — Account Takeover in Gmission Web FAX
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Gmission Web Fax allows Authentication Abuse, Session Credential Falsification through Manipulation.This issue affects Web Fax: from 3.0 before 3.0.1

item.title: CVE-2025-15067 · 8.5 HIGH — Unrestricted File Upload and RCE in Innorix WP
item.description: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in Innorix Innorix WP allows Upload a Web Shell to a Web Server.This issue affects Innorix WP from All versions If the "exam" directory exists under the directory where the product is inst…

item.title: CVE-2025-15066 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Arbitrary File Download through Path Traversal in Innorix WP
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal'), Missing Authorization vulnerability in Innorix WP allows Path Traversal.This issue affects Innorix WP from All versions If the "exam" directory exists under the directory…

item.title: CVE-2025-15065 · 8.6 HIGH — Data Exposure in Kings Information & Network KESS Enterprise
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor, Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data, Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties vulnerability in Kings Information & Network Co. KESS Enterprise on Windows allows Privilege Escalat…

item.title: CVE-2025-11020 · 8.8 HIGH — Remote Code Execution in MarkAny SafePC Enterprise
item.description: An attacker can obtain server information using Path Traversal vulnerability to conduct SQL Injection, which possibly exploits Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in MarkAny SafePC Enterprise on Windows, Linux.This issue aff…

item.title: CVE-2025-11221 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Remote Code Execution in GTONE ChangeFlow
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal'), Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type vulnerability in GTONE ChangeFlow allows Path Traversal, Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs.This iss…

item.title: CVE-2025-11182 · 7.1 HIGH — File Download in GTONE ChangeFlow
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal'), Download of Code Without Integrity Check vulnerability in GTONE ChangeFlow allows Path Traversal.This issue affects ChangeFlow: All versions to v9.0.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-7672 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored-XSS possibility in Namo CrossEditor4
item.description: The improper default setting in JiranSoft CrossEditor4 on Windows, Linux, Unix (API modules) potentaily allows Stored XSS. This issue affects CrossEditor4: from 4.0.0.01 before 4.6.0.23.

item.title: CVE-2025-3621 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Remote Code Execution in ProTNS ActADUR
item.description: Vulnerabilities* in ActADUR local server product, developed and maintained by ProTNS, allows Remote Code Inclusion on host systems. * vulnerabilities: * Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') * Use of Hard…

item.title: CVE-2024-11071 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Access Control In DestinyECM
item.description: Permissive Cross-domain Policy with Untrusted Domains vulnerability in local API server of DestinyECM solution(versions described below) which is developed and maintained by Cyberdigm may allow Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) attack, which probabil…
